prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科 主榜约第82名（2026年），近年排名稳定；2025年声誉偏正面（新闻传播学A++学科排名），2026年声誉偏负面（宿舍火灾事件）；抖音热度为高热（总排名第1 1），报考关注度较高；新闻传播学A+，但物理类招生专业以工科为主（通信工程、数字媒体技术、电子信息工程等），与新闻传播学关联度较低。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类社会热度"高热推荐"，计算机类"推荐"，工科整体偏热；本省2026年物理类考生约30,864人（估算），较2025年30,457人略有增加。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年科类改革导致位次大幅后移的特殊情况、2026年计划扩招20%使竞争缓解、工科专业热度偏高等因素，在2025年基准3757名基础上 预计位次继续后移但幅度收窄；预测最低位次约4178名，区间3678–4678名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the Science Group (Science → Physics Category) was approximately 1779 → 1939 → 2193 → 2058 → 3757. In 2025, due to the college entrance examination reform and category change (Science → Physics Category), the ranking significantly shifted backward, with a baseline of about 3757. Enrollment plans: 13 in 2021–2022, 11 in 2023, 10 in 2024, 15 in 2025; 18 in 2026, a 20% increase from 2025, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 82nd (2026), stable in recent years; reputation in 2025 is relatively positive (Journalism and Communication A++ discipline ranking), but negative in 2026 (dormitory fire incident); Douyin popularity is high (overall ranking 1st), attracting significant application attention; Journalism and Communication is A+, but the Physics Category mainly enrolls in engineering majors (Communication Engineering, Digital Media Technology, Electronic Information Engineering, etc.), with low relevance to Journalism and Communication.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors have high social popularity ("highly recommended"), Computer majors are "recommended", engineering overall is relatively hot; the number of Physics Category examinees in the province in 2026 is estimated at about 30,864, a slight increase from 30,457 in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the special situation of the significant ranking shift backward due to the 2025 category reform, the 20% enrollment expansion in 2026 easing competition, and the high popularity of engineering majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 3757, the ranking is expected to continue shifting backward but at a reduced rate; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4178, with a range of 3678–4678.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 3600), you can aim for popular majors like Advertising (Computational Advertising Dual Bachelor's Degree Experimental Class).

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group (liberal arts → history category) was approximately 196 → 536 → 430 → 688 → 642, showing an overall backward trend, with a baseline of about 642 in 2025; enrollment plan was 6 students from 2021 to 2022, increased to 8 students from 2023 to 2024, and dropped back to 6 students in 2025; the 2026 plan is 5 students, a reduction of about 16.7% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 82nd (2026), with recent rankings stable in the 82–92 range; reputation in 2025 is generally positive (Journalism and Communication A++ discipline ranking), while in 2026 it is negative (dormitory fire incident); Douyin popularity is high (overall ranking 11th), with high application attention. Journalism and Communication A+ (top nationally), highly correlated with the university's enrollment majors such as Network and New Media, Communication Studies, etc., strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of journalism and communication majors is "clearly discouraged" (Zhang Xuefeng effect), but Communication University of China, as a top industry institution, is less affected; the number of history category candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 17,136, basically unchanged from 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the 16.7% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan intensifying competition, the overall stable and slightly positive school reputation, and the appeal of the A+ Journalism and Communication discipline, the ranking is expected to move forward based on the 2025 baseline of 642; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 563, with a range of 462–664.
